# Lumusa

Official website and portfolio of Luis Muñoz Sanz (Lumusa), Computer Engineering student and Software Engineer focused on algorithms, artificial intelligence, cloud computing and modern web development.

## About

Lumusa is the personal brand of Luis Muñoz Sanz.

The website contains personal software projects, technical articles, academic work, certifications and professional experience related to Computer Science and Software Engineering.

The objective of this site is to showcase high-quality engineering projects and continuous technical learning.

## Areas of expertise

- Python
- TypeScript
- Angular
- AWS Cloud
- Artificial Intelligence
- Machine Learning
- Algorithms
- Data Structures
- Computer Vision
- REST APIs
- Cloud Computing
- Linux
- Software Architecture

## Main sections

### Portfolio

https://www.lumusa.dev/#projects

Personal software projects including:

- Algorithm Arena
- Algorithms Repository
- AWS Serverless CRUD
- Link-Com
- Computer Vision projects
- AI experiments
- Financial App

### Technologies

https://www.lumusa.dev/#technologies

Overview of programming languages, frameworks, cloud technologies and software engineering tools.

### Credentials

https://www.lumusa.dev/#credentials

University education, Red Hat certifications, Santander Open Academy courses and recommendation letters.
